'''maluru''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:miaowing|miaowing]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-l-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:miaowing|miaowing]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| maluru
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mælirith|mælirith]] || [[word:mælirij|mælirij]] || [[word:mælirish|mælirish]] || [[word:mæliri|mæliri]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:maluluruth|maluluruth]] || [[word:maluluruj|maluluruj]] || [[word:malulurush|malulurush]] || [[word:maluluru|maluluru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:maluruth|maluruth]] || [[word:maluruj|maluruj]] || [[word:malurush|malurush]] || [[word:maluru|maluru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:malufruth|malufruth]] || [[word:malufruj|malufruj]] || [[word:malufrush|malufrush]] || [[word:malufruf|malufruf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:maluruthu|maluruthu]] || [[word:maluruju|maluruju]] || [[word:malurushu|malurushu]] || [[word:maluruku|maluruku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:maluruth|maluruth]] || [[word:maluruj|maluruj]] || [[word:malurush|malurush]] || [[word:maluru|maluru]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:maluruthul|maluruthul]] || [[word:malurujul|malurujul]] || [[word:malurushul|malurushul]] || [[word:malurukul|malurukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:maluruthuthu|maluruthuthu]] || [[word:malurujuju|malurujuju]] || [[word:malurushushu|malurushushu]] || [[word:maluruku|maluruku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:maluruthun|maluruthun]] || [[word:malurujun|malurujun]] || [[word:malurushun|malurushun]] || [[word:malurukun|malurukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:maluruthuoro|maluruthuoro]] || [[word:malurujuoro|malurujuoro]] || [[word:malurushuoro|malurushuoro]] || [[word:malurukuoro|malurukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
